response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer, but the resume shows minimal alignment with the core requirements of this role. There is no demonstrated Kotlin experience, no Spring ecosystem work, no IDE internals or language tooling background, and Java appears only briefly in older roles (robotic arms, mobile orchestration) rather than as a primary stack. Recent work centers on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and AI tooling, which are largely orthogonal to enterprise JVM IDE development.
strengths: Long track record on complex systems and large-scale codebases across multiple domains
Prior experience contributing to an IDE product (LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments)
Strong software craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authored in D
concerns: No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience listed
Kotlin is absent from skills and employment history
Java exposure is limited and dated, not core JVM/language-tooling depth
